overview.value: OHB SE, headquartered in Bremen, is a publicly traded aerospace and technology group and one of Europe's leading aerospace and technology companies. The group works to make space accessible for science, business, and society, and to enable sustainable progress through technological excellence. Its activities span three business segments: Space Systems, Access to Space, and Digital.

focus.value: Satellite systems, access-to-space infrastructure, and digital services

status.value: Publicly traded aerospace and technology group (SE)
